holdings.infoBox: GAID is an equity ETF with a total of 37 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intertek Group stock at 4.14%, BOC Hong Kong (Holdings) at 4.14%, Techtronic Industries Company at 4.07%, DBS Group Holdings at 3.97%, and Daikin Industries,Ltd. at 3.86%.

overview.description: The Guinness Atkinson International Dividend Builder ETF (GAID) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in total market equity. The fund actively manages a narrow selection of stocks of companies located outside of the US that demonstrate the ability to consistently grow their dividends. The portfolio is equally weighted. GAID was launched on Dec 19, 2025 and is issued by Guinness Atkinson.
